taxonomy: Pholidia mitchellii is classified as a species of beetle in the family Cerambycidae. It belongs to the genus Pholidia, which is a group of longhorned beetles. This beetle is further divided into various species, with Pholidia mitchellii being one of them. The classification of Pholidia mitchellii reflects its distinct characteristics and its place within the broader family of Cerambycidae. The classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and the taxonomic hierarchy of the beetle.
